channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran rejects Trump’s ceasefire claim as ‘false and baseless’
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Tehran denies Trump’s claim that Iran president requests ceasefire
- Trump claims Iran’s president wants a ceasefire, Iran says that’s ‘false’
- Iran denies Trump’s claim Iranian president requested ceasefire

- Iran rejects Trump claim that it asked for a ceasefire (PHOTOS, VIDEOS)

- Trump claims Iran’s ‘new regime’ president asked US for ceasefire
- Iranian officials ‘laugh’ at Trump’s claim Iran wants a ceasefire

- Iran denies Trump’s claim Iranian president requested ceasefire
- Urgent: Iran rejects Trump's ceasefire claim as "false and baseless"
- Trump says Iran has asked for a ceasefire, US wants to see Hormuz open first
- Trump claims Iranian president has asked for ceasefire
- Trump claims Iranian president has asked for ceasefire
- Trump claims Iran’s president seeks ceasefire, IRGC denies as strikes intensify
- Iran says Trump's statements on Tehran requesting ceasefire are false and baseless
- 'False and baseless': Iran rejects Trump's ceasefire claim as war escalates
- Trump says Iran has asked for a ceasefire, US wants to see Hormuz open first
- Trump claims Iran's 'new regime president' asked for a ceasefire
- Trump claims Iran president wants ceasefire, no response from Tehran
- Urgent: Trump claims Iranian president has asked for ceasefire
- Flash: Trump claims Iranian president has asked for ceasefire
- Trump claims Iran has asked for ceasefire: ‘Will consider when Strait of Hormuz is open’
- US president says his Iranian counterpart requested ceasefire
- LIVE UPDATES: Trump Drops Ceasefire Claim On Iran Hours Before High-Stakes Primetime Address
- Trump Says Iran’s President Wants a Cease-Fire
- Trump Says He Halted Nuclear Threat From Iran, Despite Evidence to the Contrary]]>
